name: Kingdom of Saba (Sheba)
description: The foundational kingdom of Yemeni civilisation. The Sabaeans built the Awwam Temple (Moon Temple), the Barran Temple (Throne of Bilqis), and the Great Dam of Marib — one of antiquity's greatest engineering achievements. Their ashlar limestone masonry, Sabaean script inscriptions, and hydraulic irrigation systems influenced every subsequent building tradition across southern Arabia.
